title: Consulting Market Scan — AI Operations Consulting for Mid-Market Companies

findings.finding: The AI consulting market is projected to reach $64B by 2028. Mid-market segment is underserved — most AI consultancies target enterprise ($1B+ revenue) or startups.
Big 4 firms dominate enterprise AI consulting. Boutique firms and fractional CTOs serve the SMB end. The 50-500 employee segment has few dedicated providers offering hands-on implementation.
Boutique AI consultants charge $150-$350/hr. Project-based engagements range from $5K for assessments to $100K+ for full implementations. Mid-market buyers prefer fixed-price projects over hourly.

70% of mid-market companies report failed or stalled AI initiatives. The primary failure mode is strategy-without-execution. A consultant who ships working prototypes within 2-week sprints has a strong value proposition.

recommendations: Offer a fixed-price AI Readiness Assessment ($5,000) as a low-friction entry point
Deliver a working prototype within 2 weeks of every engagement to build trust early
Publish weekly LinkedIn posts analyzing real AI use cases (anonymized) from engagements
Target companies that have recently posted AI-related job listings but haven't filled them — they have budget and need
